root_cause_summary: The contract creation request used an invalid starting_at timestamp.
root_cause_details: The starting_at value was not a valid ISO-8601 timestamp accepted by the contract creation endpoint.
resolution_summary: Replaced the invalid timestamp with a valid UTC timestamp.
resolution_steps: Inspected the starting_at value in the request body.
Converted the intended start date to a valid ISO-8601 UTC timestamp.
Submitted the corrected contract creation payload.
verification_steps: Verify starting_at is a valid ISO-8601 timestamp.
Verify the API no longer returns the timestamp validation error.
verification_results: The corrected starting_at value parsed as an ISO-8601 timestamp.
The timestamp validation error was no longer returned.
